headline: Assessing Southwest Airlines (LUV) Valuation After Mixed Recent Share Price Performance
summary: Recent price performance and basic context Southwest Airlines (LUV) has attracted attention after recent share price moves, with the stock up 2.7% over the past day and 3.7% over the past week, but slightly down over the past month. Over the past 3 months the stock has declined about 21.7%, even as its 1 year total return stands at 33.3%. This mixed performance backdrop shapes how investors may look at current valuation and fundamentals. See our latest analysis for Southwest Airlines. Viewed...
